chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1654 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 20.03.2024 Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-University. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents-University has filed a schedule and undertakes that all the pensionary benefits would be paid to the petitioner as per schedule. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of; however, violation of the schedule in making payment to the petitioner shall expose the defaulter to the contempt proceedings without any notice. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
